findings.closest_serving_predecessor: Semantic Cache Distillation skips consumer prefill and reconstructs cache state, but is restricted to one Transformer topology with different weights, uses deterministic offline profiling, and reports no independent request-level behavioral-risk gate or page-native runtime path.
findings.cross_size_transport_prior_art: Dense Latent Communication evaluates all six Qwen3 4B/8B/14B directions with RoPE disentanglement, depth alignment, and per-KV-group K/V transforms.
findings.guarantee_prior_art: vCache provides a response-cache error guarantee through an online randomized policy under i.i.d. and correctly specified sigmoid assumptions; GoldenExperience cannot claim the first cache error guarantee.
findings.privacy_boundary: LCGuard addresses empirical reconstruction privacy rather than behavioral preservation and explicitly disclaims a formal privacy guarantee.
findings.proxykv_boundary: ProxyKV maps target-shaped per-key importance scores for pruning and never reconstructs K/V values.
findings.runtime_boundary: The audited translation papers do not demonstrate an atomic LMCache/vLLM paged scatter with rollback and no target object publication.
findings.unequal_head_correction: All registered Qwen3 4B/8B/14B models have eight KV heads and head dimension 128; unequal-head support is not an empirical result.

official_proceedings_note: The environment retrieved exact arXiv records and versioned full text, but TLS connections to several official proceedings/index APIs were reset. The final official MLSys/OSDI/SOSP/NSDI/ATC/FAST/EuroSys/NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR index pass remains open and unqualified first claims remain prohibited.
